Package org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions

Class Lib.FixedRewriter<T extends Formula<T>>

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.DefaultRewriter
org.eventb.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.Lib.FixedRewriter<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
IFormulaRewriter, IFormulaRewriter2
Direct Known Subclasses:
Lib.EqualityRewriter, Lib.EquivalenceRewriter

Lib
private static class Lib.FixedRewriter<T extends Formula<T>> extends DefaultRewriter
